name: rayclip
title: RayClip
description: Sync clipboard text between macOS and Android through a RayClip server.
author: personal

commands.name: push-current-clipboard
commands.title: Push Current Clipboard
commands.description: Send the current macOS clipboard text to RayClip.

commands.name: pull-latest
commands.title: Pull Latest Clipboard
commands.description: Copy the latest remote RayClip item into the macOS clipboard.

commands.name: background-sync
commands.title: Background Sync
commands.description: Periodically push local clipboard changes and pull remote clipboard changes.

preferences.name: apiUrl
preferences.title: API URL
preferences.description: RayClip server URL, for example https://rayclip.example.com

preferences.name: token
preferences.title: Token
preferences.description: Bearer token shared with the RayClip server.

preferences.name: deviceId
preferences.title: Device ID
preferences.description: Stable ID for this Mac, for example macbook-air.
